title: oxalis violacella
intro: Oxalis violacella, also known as purple wood sorrel, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Oxalidaceae family and is native to parts of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural diuretic and having anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oxalis violacella include its potential to help with urinary issues, such as kidney stones and urinary tract infections, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
